	ST.LINE_ID , 
	ST.SOURCE_DML_TYPE , 
	ST.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME , 
	ST.REFRESH_DATETIME , 
	'INCR' AS EXCEPTION_CD,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
	'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
	'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
       ATTRIBUTE37,
       ATTRIBUTE40,
       ORG_ID
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE_CG1 ST
WHERE ST.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('RETURNS','ELECTRONIC')
AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE<>'DELETE'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_ALL SCTA
	
INNER JOIN 	$$WORKDB.W_INTERCOMPANY_TRX WIT
ON WIT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'LINES'
AND WIT.SS_CD = 'CG'
AND WIT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = ST.VT_INTERFACE_ID
AND WIT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD = SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD
AND WIT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY <> -9999
	
WHERE ST.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SCTA.INTERFACE_ID
AND ST.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID =  SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
AND SCTA.SS_CODE = 'CG'
AND SCTA.TABLE_FROM IN ('3NF_OL','EXP_OL','STG_OL')
)

SELECT 
	(RANK() OVER (ORDER BY IQ.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,IQ.SS_TABLE_CD,IQ.SS_CD,IQ.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD) + SM.MAX_KEY) AS INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY,
	IQ.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
	IQ.SS_TABLE_CD,
	IQ.SS_CD,
	IQ.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM 
	(
		SELECT 
			SCOLI.VT_INTERFACE_ID AS SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
			CAST('LINES' AS CHAR(8)) AS SS_TABLE_CD,
			CAST('BV' AS CHAR(8)) AS SS_CD,
			SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD AS PARTNER_COMPANY_CD
		FROM 
		(
		SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID,VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE_BV
		UNION ALL
		SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID,VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE_BV EX
		WHERE NOT EXISTS
		(
		 SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE_BV ST
		 WHERE ST.VT_INTERFACE_ID = EX.VT_INTERFACE_ID
		)
		) SCOLI
		INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_ALL SCTA
		ON ( SCOLI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SCTA.INTERFACE_ID 
			AND SCOLI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
			AND TABLE_FROM IN ('STG_OL','EXP_OL','3NF_OL')
			AND SS_CODE = 'BV'
		)
		WHERE  SCOLI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('RETURNS','ELECTRONIC')
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
			SCCTDI.VT_INTERFACE_ID AS SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
			CAST('CUST_TRX' AS CHAR(8)) AS SS_TABLE_CD,
			CAST('BV' AS CHAR(8)) AS SS_CD,
			SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD AS PARTNER_COMPANY_CD			
		FROM 
		(
		SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID,VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_CUST_TRX_DIST_IFACE_BV 
		UNION ALL
		SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID,VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_CUST_TRX_DIST_IFACE_BV EX
		WHERE NOT EXISTS
		(
		 SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_CUST_TRX_DIST_IFACE_BV ST
		 WHERE ST.VT_INTERFACE_ID = EX.VT_INTERFACE_ID
		)
		)SCCTDI
		INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_ALL SCTA
		ON ( SCCTDI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SCTA.INTERFACE_ID 
			AND SCCTDI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
			AND TABLE_FROM IN ('STG_CT','EXP_CT','3NF_CT')
			AND SS_CODE = 'BV'
		)
		WHERE SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('AR TSS','GL TSS','AR AS','GL AS')
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
			SCOLI.VT_INTERFACE_ID AS SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
			CAST('LINES' AS CHAR(8)) AS SS_TABLE_CD,
			CAST('CG' AS CHAR(8)) AS SS_CD,
			SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD AS PARTNER_COMPANY_CD			
		FROM 
		(SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID,VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE_CG1 
		 UNION ALL
		 SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID,VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE_CG1 EX
		 WHERE NOT EXISTS
		 (
		  SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE_CG1 ST
		  WHERE ST.VT_INTERFACE_ID = EX.VT_INTERFACE_ID
		 )
		)SCOLI
        INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_ALL SCTA
	    ON ( SCOLI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SCTA.INTERFACE_ID 
		 AND SCOLI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
		 AND TABLE_FROM IN ('STG_OL','EXP_OL','3NF_OL')
		 AND SS_CODE = 'CG'
	    )
		WHERE SCOLI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('RETURNS','ELECTRONIC')
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
			SCCTDI.VT_INTERFACE_ID AS SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
			CAST('CUST_TRX' AS CHAR(8)) AS SS_TABLE_CD,
			CAST('CG' AS CHAR(8)) AS SS_CD,
			SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD AS PARTNER_COMPANY_CD			
		FROM 
		(SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID,VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_CUST_TRX_DIST_IFACE_CG1 
		 UNION ALL
		 SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID,VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_CUST_TRX_DIST_IFACE_CG1 EX
		 WHERE NOT EXISTS
		 (
		  SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_CUST_TRX_DIST_IFACE_CG1 ST
		  WHERE ST.VT_INTERFACE_ID = EX.VT_INTERFACE_ID
		 )
		)SCCTDI
        INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_ALL SCTA
  	    ON ( SCCTDI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SCTA.INTERFACE_ID 
		  AND SCCTDI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
		  AND TABLE_FROM IN ('STG_CT','EXP_CT','3NF_CT')
		  AND SS_CODE = 'CG'
	     )
		WHERE SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('AR TSS','GL TSS','AR AS','GL AS')
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
			SCVT.VT_INTERFACE_ID AS SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
			CAST('VT_IF' AS CHAR(8)) AS SS_TABLE_CD,
			CAST('CG' AS CHAR(8)) AS SS_CD,
			SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD AS PARTNER_COMPANY_CD			
		FROM 
		(SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID,VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_VT_INTERFACE_CG1 
		 UNION ALL
		 SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID,VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_VT_INTERFACE_CG1 EX
		 WHERE NOT EXISTS
		 (
		  SELECT 1
		   FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CP_VT_INTERFACE_CG1 ST
		   WHERE ST.VT_INTERFACE_ID = EX.VT_INTERFACE_ID
		 )
		)SCVT 
		INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_ALL SCTA
 	    ON ( SCVT.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SCTA.INTERFACE_ID 
		 AND SCVT.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
		 AND TABLE_FROM IN ('STG_OL','EXP_OL','3NF_OL')
		 AND SS_CODE = 'CG'
	    )
		WHERE SCVT.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('SHIPMENTS-COGS BOOKING','SHIPMENTS','SHIPMENTS-TITLE TRANSFER','ELECTRONIC')
	) IQ,
	(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY),0) AS MAX_KEY
	 FROM     $$ETLVWDB.SM_INTERCOMPANY_TRX) SM
WHERE 1=1
	AND NOT EXISTS
	 ( SELECT 1
	   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_INTERCOMPANY_TRX SM1
	   WHERE  IQ.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = SM1.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT
		AND  IQ.SS_TABLE_CD = SM1.SS_TABLE_CD
		AND  IQ.SS_CD = SM1.SS_CD
		AND  IQ.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD = SM1.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD
	 )

SELECT

(
  SELECT 1
	FROM $$WORKDB.W_INTERCOMPANY_TRX WIT

	AND WIT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = ST.INTERFACE_ID

	AND WIT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = ST.VT_INTERFACE_ID

     AND ST.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID =  SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID

SELECT 1

				  WHEN ST.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'ELECTRONIC'  THEN ST.LINE_ID

	NIT.BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD,

	NIT.RU_PRODUCT_SHIPMENT_ROLE, 
	NIT.RU_IC_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_TRX_AMT, 
	NIT.RU_IC_UNIT_SLNG_PRICE_TRX_AMT, 
	NIT.RU_CONFIGURED_ITEM_ROLE, 
	NIT.RU_POINT_OF_ENTRY_STATE_CD, 
	NIT.RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NUM, 
	NIT.RU_IC_DECOUPLING_RULE_ID_INT, 
	NIT.RU_IC_COGS_RECOGNIZED_FLG, 
	NIT.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
	NIT.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
	NIT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
	NIT.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	NIT.RU_SRC_RPRTD_CONFIG_ITEM_NAME, 
	NIT.RU_SOL_CONFIG_ITEM_SHIPPED_QTY, 
	NIT.EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT, 
	NIT.AR_TRX_KEY,
	NIT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
    NIT.RU_IC_TRX_JRNL_ENTRY_NUM_INT,
    NIT.RU_IC_TRX_JRNLENTRY_LN_NUM_INT,
    NIT.RU_IC_TRX_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
    NIT.RU_IC_TRX_COMPANY_CD,
    NIT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD,
    NIT.OWNER_COMPANY_CD,
    NIT.DV_APPLICABLE_QTY,
    NIT.ACCOUNTING_DT	,
    NIT.SOL_ROLE,
    NIT.GL_ROLE ,
    NIT.AR_ROLE ,
    NIT.ACQSTN_INTG_SEG_NAME,
    NIT.SRC_OF_REV_EXTRACT_CD,         
	NIT.REV_ASGNMNT_NAME,              
	NIT.SRC_TRANSACTION_DT,            
	NIT.REV_ALLOCATION_PCT, 
	NIT.RU_GL_SUBLEDGER_DT,
	NIT.RU_GL_POSTED_DT,
	NIT.RU_RAE_TYPE_CD,
	NIT.RU_NET_REV_TRNSCTNL_AMT,
	NIT.RU_NET_REV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
	NIT.RU_BK_TRNSCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,
	NIT.RU_GNRL_LDGR_ACCNT_KEY,
	NIT.RU_FNCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,

	NIT.RU_TITLE_TRANSFER_DTM,
	NIT.RU_DV_TITLE_TRANSFER_DT,
	NIT.RU_SHIPMENT_EVENT_TYPE_CD,
	NIT.SHIP_FROM_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY	,
	NIT.DESTINATION_GL_BATCH_NAME,
    NIT.DESTINATION_GL_RAE_BATCH_NAME,
    NIT.EP_VT_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_ALL SCTA 
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IC_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD NITPM
		  ON (NITPM.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD = COALESCE(SCTA.MC_QUALIFIER1,'UNKNOWN'))
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX NIT
		  ON SCTA.INTERFACE_ID = NIT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT
		  AND SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID =  NIT.EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT
		  AND NIT.SS_CD = 'CG'
		  AND NIT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'VT_IF'
		  AND NIT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD = SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD
          AND  NIT.BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD LIKE 'SHIPMENTS%' 
	WHERE NOT EXISTS 
		(SELECT 1 FROM
			(SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID, VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_VT_INTERFACE_CG1 
			 UNION ALL
			 SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID, VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_VT_INTERFACE_CG1 
			)STVI 
	 	 WHERE STVI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SCTA.INTERFACE_ID
			AND STVI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID =  SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
			AND SCTA.SS_CODE = 'CG' )
	AND SCTA.TABLE_FROM IN ('EXP_OL','STG_OL')
		


	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT 
		SM.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY , 
		CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS RU_BK_AR_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
		COALESCE((CASE WHEN SCVT.ATTRIBUTE11 LIKE '%*%' 
				THEN WSOL.SOLK_TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID ELSE WSOL.SOLK_LINE_ID END),-9999) AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
		SM.SS_CD AS SS_CD,
		SCTA.IC_PRICE AS EXTENDED_TRNSFR_PRICE_TRX_AMT ,
		SCTA.ADJUSTMENT_RATE AS TRANSFER_PRICE_RT,
		SM.SS_TABLE_CD AS SS_TABLE_CD,
		COALESCE(CAST(SCVT.VT_DATE_PROCESSED AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) ) AS INTERCOMPANY_PROCESSING_DT,
		SCVT.VT_INTERFACE_ID AS SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
		COALESCE(NITPM.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD,
		COALESCE(NITT.BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD,
		COALESCE(NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_BK_TRNGLN_OPRTNG_UNIT_NM_CD,
		'Y' AS RU_PRODUCT_SHIPMENT_ROLE,
		CAST(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE14 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_IC_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_TRX_AMT ,
		CAST(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE13 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_IC_UNIT_SLNG_PRICE_TRX_AMT,
		COALESCE((CASE WHEN SCVT.ATTRIBUTE11 LIKE '%*%' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END),'N') AS RU_CONFIGURED_ITEM_ROLE,
		COALESCE(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE37, 'UNKNOWN') AS RU_POINT_OF_ENTRY_STATE_CD ,
		CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NUM , /* Difference between CG1 and SJ*/
		COALESCE(CAST(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE36 AS INTEGER),-999) AS RU_IC_DECOUPLING_RULE_ID_INT , /* Difference between CG1 and SJ*/
		COALESCE(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE46,'N') AS RU_IC_COGS_RECOGNIZED_FLG ,/* Difference between CG1 and SJ*/
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
		USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
		USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
		CAST(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE11 AS VARCHAR(255)) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_CONFIG_ITEM_NAME ,
		CAST(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS RU_SOL_CONFIG_ITEM_SHIPPED_QTY ,
		SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID AS EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,
		CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER) AS AR_TRX_KEY,
		CASE WHEN SCVT.SOURCE_DML_TYPE = 'DELETE' THEN 'Y'  ELSE 'N' END AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
		-999 AS RU_IC_TRX_JRNL_ENTRY_NUM_INT,
		-999 AS RU_IC_TRX_JRNLENTRY_LN_NUM_INT,
		-999 AS RU_IC_TRX_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
		'UNK' AS RU_IC_TRX_COMPANY_CD,
		SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD,
		SCTA.OWNER_COMPANY_CD,
		CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_APPLICABLE_QTY,
		CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS ACCOUNTING_DT	,
		'Y' AS SOL_ROLE,
	    'N' AS GL_ROLE ,
	    'N' AS AR_ROLE ,
		COALESCE(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE55,'UNKNOWN') AS ACQSTN_INTG_SEG_NAME,
		COALESCE(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE56,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_OF_REV_EXTRACT_CD,         
		ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_NAME AS REV_ASGNMNT_NAME,
	    SCVT.VT_TRANSACTION_DATE AS SRC_TRANSACTION_DT,
	    SCTA.REV_ALLOCATION_PCT,
        CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RU_GL_SUBLEDGER_DT,
        CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RU_GL_POSTED_DT   ,          
		'UNKNOWN' AS RU_RAE_TYPE_CD    ,            
		CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_NET_REV_TRNSCTNL_AMT,
		CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_NET_REV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
        'UNK' AS RU_BK_TRNSCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,
        -999 AS RU_GNRL_LDGR_ACCNT_KEY,
        'UNK' AS RU_FNCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,
        'N' AS RAE_ROLE,
        SCTA.EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID,
		CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RMA_RECEIPT_DT,
		CAST(ECCD1.ATTRIBUTE26 AS INTEGER) AS RU_TTL_TRSFR_TM_ADTNL_MNTS_CNT,
		COALESCE(CAST(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE28,CHARACTER_LENGTH(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE28)) = 'M' THEN 
        CAST(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE28 AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SSBT')
             ELSE CAST(CAST(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE28 AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY') AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
				CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS RU_TITLE_TRANSFER_DTM,
        COALESCE(CAST(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE28,CHARACTER_LENGTH(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE28)) = 'M' THEN 
        CAST(CAST(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE28 AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SSBT') AS DATE)
             ELSE CAST(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE28 AS DATE FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY') END AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_TITLE_TRANSFER_DT,
		COALESCE(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE27,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_SHIPMENT_EVENT_TYPE_CD,
		COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_FROM_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
		'UNKNOWN' AS DESTINATION_GL_BATCH_NAME,
		'UNKNOWN' AS DESTINATION_GL_RAE_BATCH_NAME,
		 SCVT.VT_TRANSACTION_ID AS EP_VT_TRANSACTION_ID_INT		
	FROM 	
	(
	SELECT
	VT_INTERFACE_ID,
	VT_DATE_PROCESSED,
	VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
	VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,
	VT_TRANSACTION_ID,
	VT_TRANSACTION_DATE,
	ATTRIBUTE4,
	ATTRIBUTE9,
	ATTRIBUTE17,
	ATTRIBUTE11,
	ATTRIBUTE14,
	ATTRIBUTE13,
	ATTRIBUTE18,
	ATTRIBUTE26,
	ATTRIBUTE27,	
	ATTRIBUTE28,
	ATTRIBUTE34,
	ATTRIBUTE37,
	ATTRIBUTE36,
	ATTRIBUTE46,
	ATTRIBUTE20,
	ATTRIBUTE2,
	ATTRIBUTE55,
	ATTRIBUTE56,SOURCE_DML_TYPE
	FROM	$$STGDB.ST_CP_VT_INTERFACE_CG1
	UNION ALL
	SELECT
	VT_INTERFACE_ID,
	VT_DATE_PROCESSED,
	VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
	VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,
	VT_TRANSACTION_ID,
	VT_TRANSACTION_DATE,
	ATTRIBUTE4,
	ATTRIBUTE9,
	ATTRIBUTE17,
	ATTRIBUTE11,
	ATTRIBUTE14,
	ATTRIBUTE13,
	ATTRIBUTE18,
	ATTRIBUTE26,
	ATTRIBUTE27,	
	ATTRIBUTE28,	
	ATTRIBUTE34,
	ATTRIBUTE37,
	ATTRIBUTE36,
	ATTRIBUTE46,
	ATTRIBUTE20,
	ATTRIBUTE2,
	ATTRIBUTE55,
	ATTRIBUTE56,SOURCE_DML_TYPE
	FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_VT_INTERFACE_CG1
	WHERE EXCEPTION_CD  = 'INCR'
	) SCVT 
	INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_ALL SCTA
	  ON ( SCVT.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SCTA.INTERFACE_ID 
		AND SCVT.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
		AND SCTA.SS_CODE = 'CG'
		AND SCTA.TABLE_FROM IN ('EXP_OL','STG_OL','3NF_OL'))

     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_INTERCOMPANY_TRX SM
	  ON  (	 SM.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = SCVT.VT_INTERFACE_ID
		 AND SM.SS_TABLE_CD = 'VT_IF'
		 AND SM.SS_CD = 'CG'
		 AND SM.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD = SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD)
		 
	 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE NITT
	  ON (NITT.BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD = COALESCE(SCVT.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN'))
			
	 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IC_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD NITPM
	  ON (NITPM.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD = COALESCE(SCTA.MC_QUALIFIER1,'UNKNOWN'))
	  
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENTS ECSA
	 ON ( SCVT.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
	  AND ECSA.SS_CODE = 'CG'
	 )	
	 
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
	 ON (NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = SCVT.ATTRIBUTE17)
	 
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_CUST_DATA ECCD1
	 ON (ECCD1.CATEGORY_NAME  = 'TAX IC ACCT EXCEPTION RULES'
           AND ECCD1.ATTRIBUTE1 = SCVT.ATTRIBUTE36)

	 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_CUST_DATA ECCD
	  ON ( ECCD.CATEGORY_NAME = 'PS TRIANGULATION CONTROL' 
		 AND ECCD.ATTRIBUTE1 = SCVT.ATTRIBUTE18
		 AND ECCD.ATTRIBUTE2 = SCVT.ATTRIBUTE9
		 AND ECCD.ATTRIBUTE3 = SCVT.ATTRIBUTE17
		 AND ECCD.SS_CODE = SM.SS_CD
		)
	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
	  ON COALESCE(ECCD.ATTRIBUTE4,'UNKNOWN') = NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_SHORT_NAME
	   AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'CISCO'
	LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GTC_IC_SOL_LINE_ID WSOL
	  ON WSOL.LINE_ID = SCVT.VT_TRANSACTION_ID
	  AND WSOL.SS_CODE = 'CG'
	WHERE SCVT.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE LIKE 'SHIPMENTS%' 
	  AND SM.SS_CD = 'CG'
	
)ICT
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX NIT
	 ON NIT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY = ICT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY
	 AND NIT.SS_CD = ICT.SS_CD
	 AND NIT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD = ICT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD

	CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RMA_RECEIPT_DT,
	CAST(0 AS INTEGER) AS RU_TTL_TRSFR_TM_ADTNL_MNTS_CNT,
	CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_TITLE_TRANSFER_DTM,
	CAST( '3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS RU_DV_TITLE_TRANSFER_DT,
	'UNKNOWN' AS RU_SHIPMENT_EVENT_TYPE_CD,
	-999 AS SHIP_FROM_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
	(CASE WHEN SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('GL TSS','GL AS') AND ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_NAME NOT LIKE '%RAE GL%'
          THEN SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_REF ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS DESTINATION_GL_BATCH_NAME,
    (CASE WHEN SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('GL TSS','GL AS') AND ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_NAME LIKE '%RAE GL%' 
          THEN SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_REF ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS DESTINATION_GL_RAE_BATCH_NAME,
     SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_ID AS EP_VT_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
   FROM (
   SELECT 
   VT_INTERFACE_ID,
   VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
   VT_DATE_PROCESSED,
   VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,
   SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
   CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
   CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   VT_TRANSACTION_REF,
   VT_TRANSACTION_ID,
   SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
   VT_TRANSACTION_DATE,
   ORG_ID
   FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_CUST_TRX_DIST_IFACE_CG1 SCCTDI
   WHERE SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('AR TSS','GL TSS','AR AS','GL AS')
   UNION ALL
   SELECT 
   VT_INTERFACE_ID,
   VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
   VT_DATE_PROCESSED,
   VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,
   SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
   CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
   CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   VT_TRANSACTION_REF,
   VT_TRANSACTION_ID,
   SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
   VT_TRANSACTION_DATE,
   ORG_ID
   FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_CUST_TRX_DIST_IFACE_CG1 SCCTDI
   WHERE EXCEPTION_CD  = 'INCR' 
   AND  SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('AR TSS','GL TSS','AR AS','GL AS')
   ) SCCTDI
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_ALL SCTA
    ON ( SCCTDI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SCTA.INTERFACE_ID 
     AND SCCTDI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
	 AND SCTA.SS_CODE = 'CG'
	 AND SCTA.TABLE_FROM IN ('3NF_CT','EXP_CT','STG_CT')
    )
    
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_INTERCOMPANY_TRX SM
    ON  (SM.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = SCCTDI.VT_INTERFACE_ID
     AND SM.SS_TABLE_CD = 'CUST_TRX'
     AND SM.SS_CD = 'CG'
	 AND SM.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD = SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD)
   
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE NITT
    ON (NITT.BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD = COALESCE(SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN'))
 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IC_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD NITPM
    ON (NITPM.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD = COALESCE(SCTA.MC_QUALIFIER1,'UNKNOWN'))

   
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENTS ECSA
   ON ( SCCTDI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
        AND ECSA.SS_CODE = 'CG'
      )		   

  /*
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON ( NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SCCTDI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
    AND NAT.SS_CODE = (CASE WHEN SCCTDI.ORG_ID IN (161,167,163) THEN 'QTC' WHEN SCCTDI.ORG_ID IN (165,2290) THEN 'CG' ELSE 'BV' END)
    )
  */
  
	LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
    ON ( NSOB.SS_CODE='EMEA'
         AND NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = SCCTDI.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
		 AND SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('GL TSS','GL AS')
        )
 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
   ON   (	 SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('GL TSS','GL AS')
	      AND  SCCTDI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL
	      AND SCCTDI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID IS NOT NULL
	      AND NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT = SCCTDI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	      AND NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT = SCCTDI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
	      AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	    )
   
   WHERE 1=1 /*SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('AR TSS','GL TSS')*/
   AND SM.SS_CD = 'CG'
  
 )ICT
 LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX NIT
  ON NIT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY  = ICT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY
  AND NIT.SS_CD = ICT.SS_CD
  AND NIT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD = ICT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD

     AND NIT.SS_CD = 'BV'
	 AND NIT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD = SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD

  WHERE NOT EXISTS

	SCOLI.VT_TRANSACTION_DATE AS SRC_TRANSACTION_DT,
    SCTA.REV_ALLOCATION_PCT,
    CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RU_GL_SUBLEDGER_DT,
    CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RU_GL_POSTED_DT   ,          
	'UNKNOWN' AS RU_RAE_TYPE_CD    ,            
	CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_NET_REV_TRNSCTNL_AMT,
	CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_NET_REV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
    'UNK' AS RU_BK_TRNSCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,
    CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS RU_GNRL_LDGR_ACCNT_KEY,
    'UNK' AS RU_FNCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,
    'N' AS RAE_ROLE,
    SCTA.EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID,
     CAST(SCOLI.ATTRIBUTE15 AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY') AS RMA_RECEIPT_DT,
    CAST(0 AS INTEGER) AS RU_TTL_TRSFR_TM_ADTNL_MNTS_CNT,
    CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_TITLE_TRANSFER_DTM,
    CAST( '3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS RU_DV_TITLE_TRANSFER_DT,
    'UNKNOWN' AS RU_SHIPMENT_EVENT_TYPE_CD,
    COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_FROM_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
	'UNKNOWN' AS DESTINATION_GL_BATCH_NAME,
    'UNKNOWN' AS DESTINATION_GL_RAE_BATCH_NAME,
    SCOLI.VT_TRANSACTION_ID AS EP_VT_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
   FROM  $$STGDB.WI_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_ALL SCTA
   INNER JOIN 
       ( SELECT 
      VT_INTERFACE_ID,
      VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,
      VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
      VT_TRANSACTION_ID,
      LINE_ID,
      VT_DATE_PROCESSED,
      UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
      INVENTORY_ITEM,
      ATTRIBUTE4,
	  ATTRIBUTE12,
	  ATTRIBUTE15,
	  VT_TRANSACTION_DATE,
	  ATTRIBUTE37,
	  ATTRIBUTE40,
      SOURCE_DML_TYPE
     FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE_BV 
     UNION ALL
     SELECT 
     VT_INTERFACE_ID,
     VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,
     VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
     VT_TRANSACTION_ID,
     LINE_ID,
     VT_DATE_PROCESSED,
     UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
     INVENTORY_ITEM,
     ATTRIBUTE4,
	 ATTRIBUTE12,
	 ATTRIBUTE15,
	 VT_TRANSACTION_DATE,
	 ATTRIBUTE37,
	 ATTRIBUTE40,
     SOURCE_DML_TYPE
     FROM 
    $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_OE_LINES_IFACE_BV
    WHERE EXCEPTION_CD  = 'INCR' 
    ) SCOLI 
   ON ( SCOLI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SCTA.INTERFACE_ID 
    AND SCOLI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
	AND SCTA.SS_CODE = 'BV'
	AND SCTA.TABLE_FROM IN ('EXP_OL','STG_OL','3NF_OL')
   )
   
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_INTERCOMPANY_TRX SM 
   ON  ( SM.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = SCOLI.VT_INTERFACE_ID
     AND SM.SS_TABLE_CD = 'LINES'
     AND SM.SS_CD = 'BV'
	 AND SM.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD = SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD
        )
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE NITT
      ON (NITT.BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD = COALESCE(SCOLI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN'))
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IC_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD NITPM
      ON (NITPM.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD = COALESCE(SCTA.MC_QUALIFIER1,'UNKNOWN'))

   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENTS ECSA
	 ON ( SCOLI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
	  AND ECSA.SS_CODE = 'BV'
	 )	

	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
	ON (NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = SCOLI.ATTRIBUTE12)
	 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV SOL
	ON (	SOL.SS_CODE= SM.SS_CD
			AND SOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = 
			(CASE WHEN SCOLI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'RETURNS'     THEN SCOLI.VT_TRANSACTION_ID 
				  WHEN SCOLI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'ELECTRONIC'  THEN SCOLI.LINE_ID
	         END) 
	 )
	   
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
    ON ( SCOLI.VT_TRANSACTION_ID = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
     AND     NATLGD.SS_CODE = 'BV'
	 AND SCOLI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'ELECTRONIC' 
    )
 
  WHERE  SCOLI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('RETURNS','ELECTRONIC')
   AND SM.SS_CD = 'BV'
  
  
  UNION ALL /* CUST TRX BV */
  
    SELECT 
    SM.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY ,
    (CASE WHEN (ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_NAME LIKE '%RAE AR%' 
         OR ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_NAME LIKE '%RAE GL%')
    THEN -999 ELSE COALESCE(SCCTDI.RU_BK_AR_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,-999) END) AS RU_BK_AR_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
    -9999 AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
    SM.SS_CD AS SS_CD,
    SCTA.IC_PRICE AS EXTENDED_TRNSFR_PRICE_TRX_AMT ,
    SCTA.ADJUSTMENT_RATE AS TRANSFER_PRICE_RT,
    SM.SS_TABLE_CD AS SS_TABLE_CD,
    COALESCE(CAST(SCCTDI.VT_DATE_PROCESSED AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS INTERCOMPANY_PROCESSING_DT,
    SCCTDI.VT_INTERFACE_ID AS SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
    NITPM.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD,
    NITT.BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD,
    CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS RU_BK_TRNGLN_OPRTNG_UNIT_NM_CD,
    'N' AS RU_PRODUCT_SHIPMENT_ROLE,
    CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_IC_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_TRX_AMT ,
    CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_IC_UNIT_SLNG_PRICE_TRX_AMT,
    'N' AS RU_CONFIGURED_ITEM_ROLE ,
    CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(25)) AS RU_POINT_OF_ENTRY_STATE_CD ,
    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(50)) AS RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NUM ,
    CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS RU_IC_DECOUPLING_RULE_ID_INT ,
    'N' AS RU_IC_COGS_RECOGNIZED_FLG ,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
    USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
    USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(255)) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_CONFIG_ITEM_NAME ,
    CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS RU_SOL_CONFIG_ITEM_SHIPPED_QTY,
    
    SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID AS EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,
    COALESCE(NAT.AR_TRX_KEY,-8888) AS AR_TRX_KEY     ,
    CASE WHEN SCCTDI.SOURCE_DML_TYPE = 'DELETE' THEN 'Y'  ELSE 'N' END AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
	
	COALESCE(NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,-999) AS RU_IC_TRX_JRNL_ENTRY_NUM_INT,
    COALESCE(NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,-999) AS RU_IC_TRX_JRNLENTRY_LN_NUM_INT,
    COALESCE(NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,-999) AS RU_IC_TRX_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
    COALESCE(NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE,'UNK') AS RU_IC_TRX_COMPANY_CD,
    SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD,
    SCTA.OWNER_COMPANY_CD,
    CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_APPLICABLE_QTY,
    CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS ACCOUNTING_DT,
	'N' AS SOL_ROLE,
	(CASE WHEN SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('GL TSS','GL AS') AND
	           ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_NAME NOT LIKE '%RAE GL%' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS GL_ROLE, 
   (CASE WHEN SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('AR TSS','AR AS') AND 
	          ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_NAME NOT LIKE '%RAE AR%' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS AR_ROLE,
    'UNKNOWN' AS ACQSTN_INTG_SEG_NAME,
	'UNKNOWN' AS SRC_OF_REV_EXTRACT_CD,         
	ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_NAME AS REV_ASGNMNT_NAME,
	SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_DATE AS SRC_TRANSACTION_DT,
    SCTA.REV_ALLOCATION_PCT,
    CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RU_GL_SUBLEDGER_DT,
    CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RU_GL_POSTED_DT   ,          
	'UNKNOWN' AS RU_RAE_TYPE_CD    ,            
	CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_NET_REV_TRNSCTNL_AMT,
	CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_NET_REV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
    'UNK' AS RU_BK_TRNSCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,
    -999 AS RU_GNRL_LDGR_ACCNT_KEY,
    'UNK' AS RU_FNCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,
    'N' AS RAE_ROLE,
    SCTA.EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID,
	CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RMA_RECEIPT_DT,
	CAST(0 AS INTEGER) AS RU_TTL_TRSFR_TM_ADTNL_MNTS_CNT,
	CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_TITLE_TRANSFER_DTM,
	CAST( '3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS RU_DV_TITLE_TRANSFER_DT,
	'UNKNOWN' AS RU_SHIPMENT_EVENT_TYPE_CD,
	-999 AS SHIP_FROM_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
	(CASE WHEN SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('GL TSS','GL AS') AND ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_NAME NOT LIKE '%RAE GL%'
          THEN SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_REF ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS DESTINATION_GL_BATCH_NAME,
    (CASE WHEN SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('GL TSS','GL AS') AND ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_NAME LIKE '%RAE GL%' 
          THEN SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_REF ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS DESTINATION_GL_RAE_BATCH_NAME,
     SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_ID AS EP_VT_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
   FROM (
   SELECT 
   VT_INTERFACE_ID,
   VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
   VT_DATE_PROCESSED,
   VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,
   SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
   CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
   CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   VT_TRANSACTION_ID,
   VT_TRANSACTION_DATE,
   VT_TRANSACTION_REF,
   SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
   COALESCE(NATLGLD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,-999) AS RU_BK_AR_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
   FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_CUST_TRX_DIST_IFACE_BV SCCTDI
     LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGLD
	ON ( NATLGLD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT = SCCTDI.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
		/* AND SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('AR TSS','AR AS') */
		AND NATLGLD.SS_CODE = 'BV' /*SM.SS_CD */
	    ) 
    WHERE  SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('AR TSS','GL TSS','AR AS','GL AS')
   UNION ALL
   SELECT 
   VT_INTERFACE_ID,
   VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
   VT_DATE_PROCESSED,
   VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,
   SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
   CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
   CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   VT_TRANSACTION_ID,
   VT_TRANSACTION_DATE,
   VT_TRANSACTION_REF,
   SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
   COALESCE(NATLGLD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,-999) AS RU_BK_AR_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
   FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_CUST_TRX_DIST_IFACE_BV SCCTDI
     LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGLD
	ON ( NATLGLD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT = SCCTDI.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
		/* AND SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('AR TSS','AR AS') */
		AND NATLGLD.SS_CODE = 'BV' /*SM.SS_CD */
	    ) 
   WHERE EXCEPTION_CD  = 'INCR' 
   AND  SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('AR TSS','GL TSS','AR AS','GL AS')
   )  SCCTDI
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_ALL SCTA
    ON ( SCCTDI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SCTA.INTERFACE_ID 
     AND SCCTDI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
	 AND SCTA.SS_CODE = 'BV'
	 AND SCTA.TABLE_FROM IN ('EXP_CT','STG_CT','3NF_CT')
        )
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_INTERCOMPANY_TRX SM
    ON  (
     SM.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = SCCTDI.VT_INTERFACE_ID
     AND SM.SS_TABLE_CD = 'CUST_TRX'
     AND SM.SS_CD = 'BV'
	 AND SM.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD = SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD
        )
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE NITT
    ON (NITT.BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD = COALESCE(SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN'))
 
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IC_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD NITPM
    ON (NITPM.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD = COALESCE(SCTA.MC_QUALIFIER1,'UNKNOWN'))
	
   

   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENTS ECSA
	 ON ( SCCTDI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = ECSA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
	  AND ECSA.SS_CODE = 'BV'
	 )	
	
	LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
    ON ( NSOB.SS_CODE='EMEA'
	     AND SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('GL TSS','GL AS')
         AND NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = SCCTDI.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
        )
 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
   ON   (	  SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('GL TSS','GL AS')
	      AND SCCTDI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL
	      AND SCCTDI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID IS NOT NULL
	      AND NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT = SCCTDI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	      AND NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT = SCCTDI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
	      AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	    )
    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON ( NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SCCTDI.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
    AND NAT.SS_CODE ='BV'
    )
   
   WHERE 1=1 /*SCCTDI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('AR TSS','GL TSS')*/
   AND SM.SS_CD= 'BV'
   
     
 )ICT
 LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX NIT
  ON NIT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY  = ICT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY
  AND NIT.SS_CD = ICT.SS_CD
  AND NIT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD = ICT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD

SELECT
	 ICT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY ,
	 ICT.RU_BK_AR_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
	 ICT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
	 ICT.SS_CD ,
	 ICT.EXTENDED_TRNSFR_PRICE_TRX_AMT ,
	 ICT.TRANSFER_PRICE_RT ,
	 ICT.SS_TABLE_CD ,
	 ICT.INTERCOMPANY_PROCESSING_DT ,
	 ICT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT ,
	 ICT.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD ,
	 ICT.BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD ,
	 ICT.RU_BK_TRNGLN_OPRTNG_UNIT_NM_CD ,
	 ICT.RU_PRODUCT_SHIPMENT_ROLE ,
	 ICT.RU_IC_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_TRX_AMT ,
	 ICT.RU_IC_UNIT_SLNG_PRICE_TRX_AMT ,
	 ICT.RU_CONFIGURED_ITEM_ROLE ,
	 ICT.RU_POINT_OF_ENTRY_STATE_CD ,
	 ICT.RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NUM ,
	 ICT.RU_IC_DECOUPLING_RULE_ID_INT ,
	 ICT.RU_IC_COGS_RECOGNIZED_FLG ,
	 ICT.EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 ICT.EDW_CREATE_USER ,
	 ICT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
	 ICT.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
	 ICT.RU_SRC_RPRTD_CONFIG_ITEM_NAME ,
	 ICT.RU_SOL_CONFIG_ITEM_SHIPPED_QTY ,
	 ICT.EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,
	 ICT.AR_TRX_KEY     ,
	 ICT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
	 ICT.RU_IC_TRX_COMPANY_CD,
	 ICT.RU_IC_TRX_JRNL_ENTRY_NUM_INT,
	 ICT.RU_IC_TRX_JRNLENTRY_LN_NUM_INT,
	 ICT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD,
	 ICT.OWNER_COMPANY_CD,
	 ICT.DV_APPLICABLE_QTY,
	 ICT.RU_IC_TRX_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	 ICT.ACCOUNTING_DT,
	 ICT.SOL_ROLE,
	 ICT.GL_ROLE ,
	 ICT.AR_ROLE ,
	 ICT.ACQSTN_INTG_SEG_NAME,
     ICT.SRC_OF_REV_EXTRACT_CD,         
	 ICT.REV_ASGNMNT_NAME,              
	 ICT.SRC_TRANSACTION_DT,            
	 ICT.REV_ALLOCATION_PCT, 
	 ICT.RU_GL_SUBLEDGER_DT,
	 ICT.RU_GL_POSTED_DT,
	 ICT.RU_RAE_TYPE_CD,
	 ICT.RU_NET_REV_TRNSCTNL_AMT,
	 ICT.RU_NET_REV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
	 ICT.RU_BK_TRNSCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,
	 ICT.RU_GNRL_LDGR_ACCNT_KEY,
	 ICT.RU_FNCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,
	 ICT.RAE_ROLE,
	 ICT.EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID,		 
	 ICT.RMA_RECEIPT_DT,
	 ICT.RU_TTL_TRSFR_TM_ADTNL_MNTS_CNT,
	 ICT.RU_TITLE_TRANSFER_DTM,
	 ICT.RU_DV_TITLE_TRANSFER_DT,
	 ICT.RU_SHIPMENT_EVENT_TYPE_CD,	
	 ICT.SHIP_FROM_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
     ICT.DESTINATION_GL_BATCH_NAME,
     ICT.DESTINATION_GL_RAE_BATCH_NAME,
     ICT.EP_VT_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,	 
	 'I' AS ACTION_CODE ,
	 (CASE WHEN NIT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END)AS DML_TYPE 
FROM
(
	SELECT 
	/* Consider incremental records from Transaction Attributes that donot have 
	   corresponding Master records in the same incremental data feed. 
	   In such case update the current record in 3NF */
	NIT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY, 
	NIT.RU_BK_AR_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRIB_KEY, 
	NIT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
	NIT.SS_CD, 
	SCTA.IC_PRICE AS EXTENDED_TRNSFR_PRICE_TRX_AMT ,
	SCTA.ADJUSTMENT_RATE AS TRANSFER_PRICE_RT,
	NIT.SS_TABLE_CD, 
	NIT.INTERCOMPANY_PROCESSING_DT, 
	NIT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT, 
	NIT.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD, 
	NIT.BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD, 
	NIT.RU_BK_TRNGLN_OPRTNG_UNIT_NM_CD, 
	NIT.RU_PRODUCT_SHIPMENT_ROLE, 
	NIT.RU_IC_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_TRX_AMT, 
	NIT.RU_IC_UNIT_SLNG_PRICE_TRX_AMT, 
	NIT.RU_CONFIGURED_ITEM_ROLE, 
	NIT.RU_POINT_OF_ENTRY_STATE_CD, 
	NIT.RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NUM, 
	NIT.RU_IC_DECOUPLING_RULE_ID_INT, 
	NIT.RU_IC_COGS_RECOGNIZED_FLG, 
	NIT.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
	NIT.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
	NIT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
	NIT.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	NIT.RU_SRC_RPRTD_CONFIG_ITEM_NAME, 
	NIT.RU_SOL_CONFIG_ITEM_SHIPPED_QTY, 
	NIT.EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT, 
	NIT.AR_TRX_KEY,
	NIT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
    NIT.RU_IC_TRX_JRNL_ENTRY_NUM_INT,
    NIT.RU_IC_TRX_JRNLENTRY_LN_NUM_INT,
    NIT.RU_IC_TRX_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
    NIT.RU_IC_TRX_COMPANY_CD,
    NIT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD,
    NIT.OWNER_COMPANY_CD,
    NIT.DV_APPLICABLE_QTY,
    NIT.ACCOUNTING_DT	,
    NIT.SOL_ROLE,
    NIT.GL_ROLE ,
    NIT.AR_ROLE ,
    NIT.ACQSTN_INTG_SEG_NAME,
    NIT.SRC_OF_REV_EXTRACT_CD,         
    NIT.REV_ASGNMNT_NAME,              
    NIT.SRC_TRANSACTION_DT,            
    NIT.REV_ALLOCATION_PCT, 
    NIT.RU_GL_SUBLEDGER_DT,
    NIT.RU_GL_POSTED_DT,
    NIT.RU_RAE_TYPE_CD,
    NIT.RU_NET_REV_TRNSCTNL_AMT,
    NIT.RU_NET_REV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
    NIT.RU_BK_TRNSCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,
    NIT.RU_GNRL_LDGR_ACCNT_KEY,
    NIT.RU_FNCTNL_CURRENCY_CD,
    NIT.RAE_ROLE,
    NIT.EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID,
	NIT.RMA_RECEIPT_DT,
	NIT.RU_TTL_TRSFR_TM_ADTNL_MNTS_CNT,
	NIT.RU_TITLE_TRANSFER_DTM,
	NIT.RU_DV_TITLE_TRANSFER_DT,
	NIT.RU_SHIPMENT_EVENT_TYPE_CD,
	NIT.SHIP_FROM_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
    NIT.DESTINATION_GL_BATCH_NAME,
    NIT.DESTINATION_GL_RAE_BATCH_NAME,
    NIT.EP_VT_TRANSACTION_ID_INT	
    FROM $$STGDB.WI_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_ALL SCTA 
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IC_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD NITPM
		  ON (NITPM.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD = COALESCE(SCTA.MC_QUALIFIER1,'UNKNOWN'))
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX NIT
		  ON SCTA.INTERFACE_ID = NIT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT
		  AND SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID =  NIT.EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT
		  AND NIT.SS_CD = 'CG'
		  AND NIT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'VT_IF'
		  AND NIT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD = SCTA.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD
		  AND NIT.BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD = 'ELECTRONIC SHIPMENTS'
	WHERE NOT EXISTS 
		(SELECT 1 FROM
			(SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID, VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_VT_INTERFACE_CG1 
			 UNION ALL
			 SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID, VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_VT_INTERFACE_CG1 
			)STVI 
	 	 WHERE STVI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SCTA.INTERFACE_ID
			AND STVI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID =  SCTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
			AND SCTA.SS_CODE = 'CG' )
	AND SCTA.TABLE_FROM IN ('EXP_OL','STG_OL')
		


UNION ALL
 
	SELECT 
		SM.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY , 
		-999 AS RU_BK_AR_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
		-9999 AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
		SM.SS_CD AS SS_CD,
		SCTA.IC_PRICE AS EXTENDED_TRNSFR_PRICE_TRX_AMT ,
		SCTA.ADJUSTMENT_RATE AS TRANSFER_PRICE_RT,
		SM.SS_TABLE_CD AS SS_TABLE_CD,
		COALESCE(CAST(SCVT.VT_DATE_PROCESSED AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) ) AS INTERCOMPANY_PROCESSING_DT,
		SCVT.VT_INTERFACE_ID AS SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
		COALESCE(NITPM.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD,
		'ELECTRONIC SHIPMENTS' AS BK_INTERCOMPANY_TRX_TYPE_CD,
		'UNKNOWN' AS RU_BK_TRNGLN_OPRTNG_UNIT_NM_CD,
		'N' AS RU_PRODUCT_SHIPMENT_ROLE,
		CAST(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE14 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_IC_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_TRX_AMT ,
		CAST(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE13 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_IC_UNIT_SLNG_PRICE_TRX_AMT,
		'N' AS RU_CONFIGURED_ITEM_ROLE,
		COALESCE(SCVT.ATTRIBUTE37, 'UNKNOWN') AS RU_POINT_OF_ENTRY_STATE_CD ,
		CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NUM , /* Difference between CG1 and SJ*/
		-999 AS RU_IC_DECOUPLING_RULE_ID_INT , /* Difference between CG1 and SJ*/
		 'N' AS RU_IC_COGS_RECOGNIZED_FLG ,/* Difference between CG1 and SJ*/
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
		USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
		USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
		CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(255)) AS RU_SRC_RPRTD_CONFIG_ITEM_NAME ,

CAST('3NF_CT' AS VARCHAR(10)) AS TABLE_FROM,
3 AS PRIORITY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX NIT
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IC_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD NITPM
ON (NITPM.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD = NIT.BK_TRANSFER_PRICE_METHOD_CD)
INNER JOIN 
( SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID, VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_CUST_TRX_DIST_IFACE_CG1 
UNION ALL
 SELECT VT_INTERFACE_ID, VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_CUST_TRX_DIST_IFACE_CG1 
 )ST ON   ST.VT_INTERFACE_ID =  NIT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT
    AND  ST.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = NIT.EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT
    AND  NIT.SS_CD = 'CG'
    AND  NIT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'CUST_TRX'
)ATTR
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION  BY INTERFACE_ID,SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,PARTNER_COMPANY_CD ORDER BY PRIORITY ASC)=1
) IQ
